messages.content: write the following statements in a professional tone: ●	Stakeholder Collaboration: Accustomed to collaborating with stakeholders, Sales Managers, Branch Managers, RTOS to ensure training programs align with business operations.  Evaluated success of training programs and recommended improvements to upper management to enhance effectiveness. Assessed skill gaps for employees and developed training courses to meet identified needs while seeking to improve existing resources and training strategies. In my most recent role at Mainfreight I was involved in the curriculum design, implementation and coordinating the roll out of the Chain of Responsibility (CoR), part of the Heavy Vehicle National Law (HVNL) training program. This is to ensure all suppliers, internal drivers, employees were aware of their responsibilities in the transportation of goods on the roads. In addition to engaging consistently with the regulating bodies National Transport Commission (NTC), regular and ongoing collaboration between all Sales Managers, Customers, Managers, were necessary to ensure training programs aligns with project objectives and reflect all new changes as they come. This program was a cost saving initiatives for the business achieving its compliance and regulatory responsibilities. This project had allowed me exposure to levels of strategic planning, accountability management and standards of operations and policy analysis and development. Our major focus over the past five years has been laying the legislative and planning framework to avoid further financial penalties as a result of breaching the laws from across our employees who had been aware of the new regulations.

Stakeholder Collaboration: Experienced in effectively collaborating with stakeholders, including Sales Managers, Branch Managers, and RTOS, to ensure training programs are aligned with business operations. Conducted thorough evaluations of training programs to identify areas for improvement and provided recommendations to upper management for enhancing effectiveness. Assessed skill gaps among employees and developed targeted training courses to address identified needs, while also seeking to enhance existing resources and training strategies.

In my previous position at Mainfreight, I played a key role in the design, implementation, and coordination of the Chain of Responsibility (CoR) training program, which was part of the Heavy Vehicle National Law (HVNL). This program aimed to ensure that all suppliers, internal drivers, and employees were fully aware of their responsibilities in the transportation of goods on the roads. Throughout this project, I maintained consistent engagement with the regulating body, the National Transport Commission (NTC), and collaborated extensively with Sales Managers, Customers, and Managers to ensure that the training programs aligned with project objectives and effectively incorporated any new changes or updates. This initiative significantly contributed to cost savings for the organization by ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements.

Undertaking this project provided me with valuable exposure to strategic planning, accountability management, and standards of operations and policy analysis and development. Over the past five years, our primary focus has been on establishing a robust legislative and planning framework to mitigate the risk of financial penalties resulting from any non-compliance with new regulations. By ensuring that our employees were well-informed about these regulations, we aimed to prevent any breaches and subsequent financial losses.

keeping the same tone; write the same professional written compilation to the following statement : ●	Training Program Management: Developed and implemented lesson plans based on student needs and abilities, resulting in improved student engagement and satisfaction. This would include PowerPoint Presentations, Student Handbook Modules etc. Teamwork and relationship building within our training team was pivotal in meeting our KPI delivery targets. For example, overseeing your own specific regions and scheduling of travels and logistics of trainers to manage training programs. Often this will require monitoring travel logistics for cost saving purposes. For example, when I had been available to be in Townsville (QLD), I would schedule a full 5-day training for the team and offer to audit their branch within the same week saving the branch cost to cover another traveling cost to complete internal auditing functions.

Training Program Management: Utilized a student-centered approach to develop and implement tailored lesson plans that effectively addressed the unique needs and abilities of our students. As a result, we observed a noticeable improvement in student engagement and overall satisfaction. This encompassed the creation of instructional materials such as PowerPoint presentations and student handbook modules, which further enhanced the learning experience.

The success of our training programs relied heavily on fostering teamwork and cultivating strong relationships within our training team. This collaborative approach proved instrumental in meeting our key performance indicator (KPI) delivery targets. Specifically, as part of my responsibilities, I oversaw the scheduling and logistics of trainers in their respective regions. This involved diligently monitoring travel arrangements to optimize cost-saving opportunities. For instance, when I was available to be in Townsville (QLD), I strategically planned a full 5-day training session for the team and concurrently offered to conduct branch audits within the same week. This approach contributed to cost efficiencies by eliminating the need for additional travel expenses to fulfill internal auditing functions.

By effectively managing the training program and implementing these strategies, we successfully enhanced the overall effectiveness of our training initiatives, optimized performance, and maximized cost savings for the organization.

write professional tone for the following: ●	Curriculum Development support: Resourceful in curriculum development by collaborating, analysing, instructional materials and makes independent judgments, evaluation, and improvements about effectiveness of training. Earlier on, whilst in the Warehousing Operations team, I built track record of being the subject matter expert in warehousing operations for all customer service teams, adding value to the business and maximizing customer satisfaction contributing to increased revenue for existing and new prospective customers. Additionally, my team manager could rely on my expertise to provide needed training for new graduates coming through the business. This had resulted in an increase morale for new tea members by 60% increasing our employee retention rate over the next 12 months period. This was the first opportunity to start developing manual (training manuals) to ensure training programs align with business objectives and reflect Standard of Operations organizational guidelines.

Curriculum Development Support: Demonstrated resourcefulness in supporting curriculum development through effective collaboration, meticulous analysis of instructional materials, and exercising independent judgment for evaluating and enhancing training effectiveness. During my tenure in the Warehousing Operations team, I established a reputation as a subject matter expert in warehousing operations, providing invaluable support to customer service teams. This expertise significantly contributed to the overall business success and optimization of customer satisfaction, resulting in increased revenue from both existing and prospective clients.

Moreover, my proficiency in training and development facilitated seamless onboarding for new graduates joining the organization. As a result, our team manager consistently relied on my expertise to deliver the necessary training programs for these new hires. This proactive approach exponentially boosted morale among new team members by an impressive 60%, effectively elevating our employee retention rate over the subsequent 12-month period.

This experience served as a pivotal opportunity to commence the development of comprehensive manuals, ensuring that our training programs aligned seamlessly with our business objectives and meticulously reflected our organizational guidelines and Standard of Operations.

write professional tone for the following: ●	Training Delivery: The impact of training professional skills allowed me the opportunity to make a direct contribution to the company objectives for example, in any 1 given year, having a track record of delivering courses across to 400+ national team members to enhance the skills and knowledge of employees with a focus of processes and safety to promote safety and compliance practices. Becoming and subject matter expert in delivering the business culture programs and provided extensive technical support to different departments both for external and internal stakeholders.

Training Delivery: The profound impact of delivering comprehensive training on professional skills has afforded me the opportunity to directly contribute to the achievement of company objectives. Over the course of a single year, I have consistently delivered courses to a diverse group of over 400 national team members, significantly enhancing their skills and knowledge. The primary focus of these training initiatives has been to promote safety consciousness and compliance practices, prioritizing the utmost importance of processes and safety within the organization.

As a subject matter expert, I have also played a pivotal role in delivering business culture programs, providing extensive technical support to various departments and catering to the needs of both external and internal stakeholders. This multifaceted involvement has allowed me to solidify my expertise in imparting knowledge and instilling the desired organizational values, fostering a strong sense of unity and alignment within the workforce.

By consistently delivering high-quality training programs and offering comprehensive technical support, I have contributed to the organization's overarching goals, driving positive outcomes, and facilitating the attainment of excellence in both productivity and employee well-being.

write professional tone for the following: ●	Evaluation and Improvement: Problem solving included where I suggested to deliver a “problem-solving” session as a supplement to the existing Customer Service and Systems training courses. This had improved on our customer service satisfaction rate by 15% whilst the biggest improved impact of 65% was evident in team confidence to tackle troubleshooting “angry customers” coming through the business.

Evaluation and Improvement: As part of ongoing evaluation and improvement efforts, I identified an opportunity to enhance our existing training programs by introducing a dedicated "problem-solving" session to supplement our Customer Service and Systems training courses. Recognizing the significance of effective problem-solving skills in delivering exceptional customer service, this initiative yielded remarkable results.

By incorporating this problem-solving session into our training curriculum, we observed a notable improvement of 15% in our customer service satisfaction rate. Moreover, the impact was particularly pronounced concerning our team's confidence in handling and resolving issues with "angry customers," resulting in an impressive 65% increase in their ability to navigate and effectively address challenging situations.

This focused intervention not only made a measurable difference in customer satisfaction but also significantly bolstered the overall team morale and performance. By reevaluating and enhancing our training programs, we empowered our team members to excel in problem-solving and equipped them with the tools and knowledge to navigate complex customer interactions more effectively.

write the following in professional tone - maximising to 100 words: ●	Competency and Learning Management System: The benefit of using LMS system also allowed our trainers to access and build to provide reports for evaluation and reporting purposes. The reports from LMS also confirms lists of compulsory courses each team members are required to complete to meet business standards of operations which results in the business meeting its compliance and business procedures (Reporting, Safety, Risk & Compliance) responsibilities, while actively maintaining the distribution of internal material and training across all staff within a set time frame.

Competency and Learning Management System: The utilization of an LMS system proved highly advantageous, enabling our trainers to easily access, compile, and generate comprehensive reports for evaluation and reporting purposes. These reports not only confirm the completion of compulsory courses by team members, but also ensure alignment with our business standards of operations. This robust system contributes significantly to our overall compliance with regulatory requirements and adherence to business procedures such as reporting, safety, risk, and compliance.

Additionally, the LMS facilitates efficient distribution of internal materials and training to all staff within specified time frames. This seamless dissemination of vital information further enhances our employees' competency levels and maximizes their readiness to fulfill their roles effectively.

This encompassed the creation of instructional materials such as PowerPoint presentations and student handbook modules, which further enhanced the learning experience. The success of our training programs relied heavily on fostering teamwork and cultivating strong relationships within our training team. This involved creating instructional materials, including PowerPoint presentations and student handbook modules, to enhance the overall learning experience.
